name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to research workflow, data coverage, or UX
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow or limitation are you trying to improve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the improvement.

## Why It Matters

Explain the value for analysts or maintainers.

## Notes

Include any design, data-source, or implementation ideas.
